title: C85 — Triadic-Constraint Homology (the ARCH-1 bridge, promoted from CM-C47): the three Φ axes…

story.text:
# C85
**Triadic-Constraint Homology (the ARCH-1 bridge, promoted from CM-C47): the three Φ axes and the lattice's Datum·Stratum·Spectrum are one triadic primitive; candidate pair map Protection+Delegation→Σ, Memory+Value→Δ, Connection+Computation→Γ; the gap is β**

*Confidence:* ~40% · *Status:* active · registered Run 4, 2026-06-10 · CM-C47 becomes alias · two named predictions (bnot-pairs invert all axes; stratum-3 is the no-dominant-axis seat) · *Register:* core
*Home:* privacy_value_v6_draft.md Part IV §IV.2

Band VIII · Registered during the V6 runs

story.title: Tome VIII Act 04 — The Gap Is β
story.text: a tome act that cites this conjecture.
